channel.title: JobsByCulture — The Culture Report
channel.description: Data-driven insights on AI company culture, work-life balance, and what it's actually like to work at top tech companies.

item.title: Working at Perplexity AI in 2026: Culture & Comp
item.description: Inside Perplexity AI's culture in 2026 — highest Glassdoor in our database (4.7/5) but WLB of 3.3. Real employee reviews, comp data, and who thrives there.

item.title: Working at Stripe in 2026: Culture & Comp
item.description: Inside Stripe's elite engineering culture in 2026 — 4.0 Glassdoor rating, writing-first communication, top-tier comp, and what 8,000 employees actually...

item.title: Working at Figma in 2026: $510K Comp, 3.7 Glassdoor & the Real Culture
item.description: What's it really like inside Figma in 2026? 3.7 Glassdoor, 3.1 WLB, $510K senior comp — but 5 managers in 2 years and 996 hours on many teams. Post-IPO, post-Adobe. The honest story.

item.title: Working at HubSpot in 2026: Glassdoor, Culture Code & What 8,000 Employees Say
item.description: HubSpot Glassdoor rating is 4.3 with 90% recommend in 2026. The Culture Code company — 4.1 WLB, remote-first, 276 open roles. What employees really say about working at the CRM giant.

item.title: Working at OpenAI in 2026: Culture, Work-Life Balance & Salary
item.description: Is OpenAI a good place to work in 2026? 4.5 Glassdoor, $350k–$550k comp, but how's the work-life balance? Honest breakdown from employee reviews + hiring status.

item.title: Working at Cursor (Anysphere) in 2026: Glassdoor, Salary & Culture
item.description: Cursor (Anysphere) Glassdoor rating: 4.0/5. ~50 employees, $200k–$400k engineer comp, 3.5 WLB score. Honest breakdown of culture, salary, work-life balance & open careers.

item.title: Working at Databricks in 2026: Glassdoor, Salary & Employee Reviews
item.description: Is Databricks a good place to work? 4.1 Glassdoor rating, 7,000+ employees, $280k–$450k engineer comp. Real pros & cons from employee reviews + open roles.

item.title: Working at Datadog in 2026: Glassdoor, Salary & Engineering Culture
item.description: What's it really like working at Datadog in 2026? 4.2 Glassdoor, $200k-$400k TC, 466 open roles across 8+ countries. Engineering culture, comp breakdown, and honest pros/cons from employees.

item.title: Working at Google DeepMind in 2026: Culture & Comp
item.description: What's it really like working at Google DeepMind in 2026? We break down the 4.2 Glassdoor rating, $300k–$500k comp, Nobel Prize research, and real...

item.title: Working at Anthropic in 2026: ~1,100 Employees, 4.4 Glassdoor & Work-Life Balance
item.description: Anthropic has ~1,100 employees in 2026 with 449 open roles. 4.4 Glassdoor, 3.7 WLB score, $300K-$490K engineer comp. Real employee reviews on culture, work-life balance, and what it's actually like.

item.title: Working at Cloudflare in 2026: Glassdoor, Culture & What Engineers Say
item.description: What's it really like working at Cloudflare in 2026? 3.9 Glassdoor, 3.7 WLB, 72% recommend. Strong engineering brand, edge computing pioneer, but Senior Management at 3.5 is a concern. The full picture.

item.title: Working at CoreWeave in 2026: Glassdoor Reviews, Culture & Careers
item.description: CoreWeave has ~1,800 employees and a 3.6 Glassdoor rating. NVIDIA-backed GPU cloud growing fast — but is it a good place to work? Real employee reviews + open roles.

item.title: Stripe Layoffs 2026: What Happened, Recovery & Is Stripe Hiring?
item.description: Stripe laid off 14% in 2022. In 2026 they have 8,000 employees, 515 open roles, and a 4.0 Glassdoor. Here's the full recovery story and what employees say now.

item.title: Working at Airbnb in 2026: Glassdoor Rating, Salary & Live and Work Anywhere Policy
item.description: Airbnb Glassdoor rating is 4.1/5.0 in 2026. Engineers earn $180k–$350k TC with no location-based pay cuts. We break down the Live and Work Anywhere policy, real employee reviews, and 258 open roles.

item.title: Employer Brand Benchmarks 2026: How 45 AI Companies Rate on Glassdoor
item.description: We benchmarked employer brands across 45 AI & tech companies. Median Glassdoor is 4.2, median WLB is 3.8. Full rankings from Vast AI (5.0) to Cohere (2.9), plus what separates top employers from the rest.

item.title: Highest Paying AI Companies in 2026: Full Salary + Equity Breakdown
item.description: 29 AI companies ranked by total comp (base + equity + bonus). OpenAI pays $350k–$550k, Anthropic $300k–$490k, DeepMind $300k–$500k. See where your offer stacks up.

item.title: Culture Fit Interview Questions [2026 Guide]
item.description: 50+ culture fit interview questions organized by 18 company values like remote-first, work-life balance, and engineering-driven. Backed by Glassdoor data...

item.title: Anthropic Compensation 2026: Salary, Equity, Bonus & How It Compares
item.description: Anthropic pays $300k–$490k TC for engineers with a 4.8/5 Glassdoor comp score — highest in our database of 45 companies. Full breakdown of salary, equity, bonus, and how it compares to OpenAI, DeepMind, and Stripe.

item.title: Best AI Companies to Work For in 2026
item.description: We ranked all 35 AI & tech companies by Glassdoor rating. Vast AI leads at 5.0, Cohere trails at 2.9. See the full rankings with employee reviews.

item.title: Best AI Companies for Work-Life Balance in 2026
item.description: We ranked all 35 AI & tech companies by work-life balance score using Glassdoor data. See who leads (Vast AI at 4.5) and who trails (Scale AI at 2.7).

item.title: AI Hiring Trends 2026: Which Companies Are Hiring the Most (and Fastest)
item.description: We analyzed 7,083 open roles across 45 AI companies. Mistral AI is hiring at 145% of headcount. Databricks leads with 836 roles. Full hiring intensity rankings, role demand data, and what it means for recruiters.

item.title: AI Jobs in Paris 2026: 220 Roles at Mistral, Datadog, Hugging Face & 10 More Companies
item.description: 220 AI & tech jobs in Paris from 13 companies including Mistral AI (95 roles), Datadog (55), Databricks (24), and Hugging Face. Salary data, company culture ratings, and how to land an AI job in Europe's AI capital.

item.title: AI Company Employee Count 2026: Headcount for 45 Companies
item.description: How many employees does Anthropic, OpenAI, Stripe, Databricks, or DeepMind have in 2026? Full headcount list for 40 AI & tech companies with growth rates and open roles.

item.title: Working at Supabase in 2026: Culture, Compensation & What Employees Say
item.description: What's it really like working at Supabase in 2026? 4.8 Glassdoor but only 3.0 WLB — 100% recommend yet relentless pace. Open source, fully remote, $5B valuation. The real story.

item.title: Working at Together AI in 2026: Culture, Compensation & What Employees Say
item.description: What's it really like working at Together AI in 2026? The open-source AI cloud with $3.3B valuation, ~300 employees, $300M revenue, and 46 open roles. Real employee reviews inside.

item.title: Working at Mistral AI in 2026: Culture, Compensation & What Employees Say
item.description: What's it really like working at Mistral AI in 2026? Europe's fastest AI unicorn — 4.0 Glassdoor, 145 open roles for ~700 employees, $14B valuation, and what the team actually says.

item.title: Working at Grafana Labs in 2026: Fully Remote, 4.1 Glassdoor & Open Roles
item.description: Grafana Labs is 100% remote with a 4.1 Glassdoor rating and $400M+ ARR. Employee count, salary data, real reviews on culture and work-life balance.

item.title: 11 Remote-Friendly AI Companies Actually Hiring in 2026
item.description: Not just remote-OK — genuinely remote-first. 11 AI companies with real remote culture, open roles, Glassdoor ratings, and what employees actually say about WFH.

item.title: Open Source AI Companies Hiring in 2026
item.description: 9 open source AI companies actively hiring in 2026 — 729 open jobs from Hugging Face, LangChain, Vercel, Airbnb, and more. Real Glassdoor data and...

item.description: Side-by-side comparison of OpenAI and Google DeepMind — Glassdoor ratings (4.5 vs 4.2), work-life balance (3.6 vs 4.0), culture values, compensation, and...

item.title: Flat Hierarchy in Tech: 8 Real Examples
item.description: 8 AI & tech companies where flat hierarchy is real — not just a buzzword. Glassdoor data, employee reviews, and open roles at companies like Anthropic,...

item.title: Best AI Companies for WLB in SF (2026)
item.description: We ranked 27 AI & tech companies with jobs in San Francisco by work-life balance score. Notion leads at 4.2 — Scale AI trails at 2.7. 1,847 open SF jobs.

item.title: Best AI Startups to Join in 2026: Small Teams, Big Impact
item.description: 11 AI startups under 500 employees ranked by Glassdoor rating. Vast AI leads at 5.0, Linear at 4.6, and LangChain at 4.6. 619 open jobs across all startups.

item.title: Best AI Companies for Work-Life Balance in New York (2026)
item.description: We ranked 26 AI & tech companies with jobs in New York by work-life balance score. Hugging Face leads at 4.1 among major employers — Scale AI trails at...

item.title: Best AI & Tech Companies for Engineers in 2026
item.description: We ranked 35 AI & tech companies by what engineers care about most. See who leads in technical culture, compensation, autonomy, and open source — plus...

item.title: Anthropic Remote Work Policy 2026: Is Anthropic Remote Friendly?
item.description: Is Anthropic remote friendly in 2026? Only 8% of 454 open roles are remote-friendly. SF is the center of gravity. Here's the real remote work policy, office locations, and what employees say.
